summary: Backend payment refactoring tests PASSED (13/13, 2 skipped). Frontend /pagos page working correctly. Fixed one bug in GET /api/facturas-proveedor/{id}/pagos endpoint (COALESCE type mismatch with ENUM).

bugs_fixed.issue: COALESCE types character varying and tipo_pago cannot be matched
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed COALESCE(mt.tipo, p.tipo) to COALESCE(mt.tipo, p.tipo::text) to cast ENUM to text

backend_tests.TestUpdatePago::test_update_conciliado_p: SKIPPED (no conciliado pagos in test data)
backend_tests.TestDeletePago::test_delete_conciliado_p: SKIPPED (no conciliado pagos in test data)

frontend_tests.table_columns: PASS - 8 columns (Número, Fecha, Tipo, Cuenta, Monto, Referencia, Estado, Acciones)
frontend_tests.edit_button: PASS - Edit button visible and opens modal
frontend_tests.edit_modal: PASS - Modal has numero (disabled), tipo (disabled), fecha, referencia, notas fields
frontend_tests.tipo_filter: PASS - Filter dropdown works correctly with API

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/pagos: Returns list from cont_movimiento_tesoreria with detalles/aplicaciones
api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/pagos: Creates record in cont_movimiento_tesoreria, updates cuenta_financiera saldo and factura estado
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/pagos/{id}: Returns single payment with detalles and aplicaciones
api_endpoints_verified.DELETE /api/pagos/{id}: Reverses balances and deletes from cont_movimiento_tesoreria
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/facturas-proveedor/{id}/pagos: Returns payments via COALESCE query for both old/new records (FIXED)

lifecycle_tests.factura_payment_lifecycle: PASS - Create factura -> pay -> verify estado=pagado -> delete pago -> verify estado=pendiente
lifecycle_tests.letras_lifecycle: PASS - Create factura -> generate letras -> pay letra -> verify letra estado=pagada

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: pagos.py correctly reads/writes from cont_movimiento_tesoreria as single source of truth
PASS: cont_pago_detalle and cont_pago_aplicacion use movimiento_tesoreria_id for new payments
PASS: Delete handler has fallback logic for both old (pago_id) and new (movimiento_tesoreria_id) styles
PASS: Frontend Pagos.jsx displays all treasury movements with correct columns
PASS: Frontend edit modal correctly restricts fields for conciliado pagos
FIXED: compras.py COALESCE query needed p.tipo::text cast for ENUM compatibility

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 passed, 2 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: Test creates and cleans up test facturas, pagos, and letras during lifecycle tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment refactoring is complete. All CRUD operations on /api/pagos now use cont_movimiento_tesoreria as single source of truth. cont_pago table is deprecated. Frontend /pagos page displays movements correctly with edit/delete functionality. The fix applied was to cast p.tipo ENUM to text in the COALESCE query for get_pagos_de_factura endpoint.
